_meta.source: perks/weapons: darkanddarker.wiki.spellsandguns.com/Bard; base stats & skills: api.darkerdb.com/v1/classes (merged by scripts/build-classes.mjs)
_meta.note: Song system (music minigame) is out of scope for the stat engine; songs appear as skills only.

name: Bard
perk_slot_rule: 1 slot + 1 additional slot every 5 levels; 4 slots at level 15 (max)

perks.name: Charismatic Performance
perks.effect: Upgrades a 'good' performance into a 'perfect' performance

perks.name: Dancing Feet
perks.effect: +10 Move Speed while holding an instrument

perks.name: Jolly Time
perks.effect: Drinking ale restores 5 Physical Base Healing and grants +5 Move Speed and +5 Vigor

perks.name: Lore Mastery
perks.effect: +30% Regular Interaction Speed and +10 Memory Capacity

perks.name: Melodic Protection
perks.effect: +25% Physical and Magical Damage Reduction while playing songs

perks.name: Rapier Mastery
perks.effect: With rapier equipped: +3 Physical Buff Weapon Damage and +5% Action Speed

perks.name: Reinforced Instruments
perks.effect: +50% Physical Power Bonus when attacking with musical instruments

perks.name: Story Teller
perks.effect: Party members within 6m gain +5 Will and +3 Knowledge

perks.name: Superior Dexterity
perks.effect: +50% Item Equip Speed when switching weapons/utilities

skills.name: Dissonance
skills.effect:
Plays an instrument to make an unpleasant noise that silences all enemy targets for seconds.
Silence: Disables skills spells performance abilities.

skills.name: Encore
skills.effect: Resets the duration of all active music buffs on nearby party members. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Music Memory
skills.effect: Gain the ability to store up to 5 sheets of music.

skills.name: Music Memory II
skills.effect: Gain the ability to store up to 5 sheets of music.

skills.name: Party Maker
skills.effect: Play an instrument to grant all nearby allies immunity to drunkenness for seconds. While immune, drinking alcohol restores health. Cooldown: seconds
